thread.title: Model Training (全链路)
thread.definitionDraft: Full-stack model training is the complete pipeline that turns a large model from zero parameters into a usable assistant: pre-training (self-supervised next-token prediction governed by scaling laws) followed by post-training / alignment (SFT → RLHF → DPO → RLVR/GRPO).
thread.whyNow: After Ilya Sutskever declared at NeurIPS 2024 that "pre-training as we know it will end" (data is AI’s fossil fuel and has peaked), the industry’s center of gravity shifted from stacking pre-training data toward post-training / RL / test-time compute — making "how you train" the main battleground for capability differences.
thread.useBoundary: Focus on the training-side causes: how scaling laws set pre-training scale, how SFT/RLHF/RLVR/GRPO shape a base model into an assistant. Exclude test-time/inference-time methods themselves (reasoning-models thread).

sourceRequirements.companyStrategyContextPolicy: Company strategy sources may be kept only as optional company_strategy_context targets and must not count toward topic readiness.

sources.title: Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models
sources.whyRelevant: 预训练 scaling laws 奠基：损失随规模/数据/算力呈幂律。
sources.text:
Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models

sources.title: Training Compute-Optimal Large Language Models (Chinchilla)
sources.whyRelevant: 修正 Kaplan：模型与 token 数应等比放大，多数模型欠训。
sources.text:
Training Compute-Optimal Large Language Models (Chinchilla)

sources.title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback (InstructGPT)
sources.whyRelevant: RLHF 三步法（SFT + 奖励模型 + PPO）奠基，ChatGPT 前身。
sources.text:

sources.title: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO)
sources.whyRelevant: 免奖励模型直接优化偏好，把 RLHF 化简为分类损失。
sources.text:

sources.whyRelevant: GRPO 算法首次提出，比 PPO 更省显存的组相对优化。
sources.text:

sources.whyRelevant: RLHF 默认 RL 算法的源头，后训练 RL 的底层引擎。

sources.title: allenai/open-instruct (Tülu 3 训练代码库)
sources.whyRelevant: RLVR/DPO/SFT 全开源后训练实现，配 Tülu 3 论文。
sources.text:
allenai/open-instruct (Tülu 3 训练代码库)

edges.evidenceNote: Chinchilla 修正 Kaplan 的算力分配结论，指出模型与数据应等比放大。
InstructGPT 的 RLHF 第三步直接用 Schulman 的 PPO 做策略优化。
DPO 把 InstructGPT 的"奖励模型+PPO"两步化简为单一分类损失。
R1 直接采用 DeepSeekMath 提出的 GRPO 作为 RL 框架。
R1 以 V3-Base 为底座做纯 RL 后训练。
TRL 的 GRPOTrainer 实现了 DeepSeek 提出、用于训 R1 的 GRPO。
Tülu 3 四阶段配方把 DPO 串进 SFT→DPO→RLVR 流水线。
"peak data" 宣告 Chinchilla 式"加数据加规模"范式逼近天花板。

review.notes: Deep-core 2026-06-21: 18 sources / 8 edges, all arXiv ids verified (2001.08361 Kaplan, 2203.15556 Chinchilla, 2203.02155 InstructGPT, 2305.18290 DPO, 2402.03300 GRPO, 1707.06347 PPO, 2412.19437 V3, 2501.12948 R1, 2407.21783 Llama3). 2 transcripts (Schulman/Karpathy) at source_pack_review pending re-fetch. Roles all >=2.
